data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check ACs complete. AC3 (testing_mode in eval): PASS. AC4 (RED marker in .test-index): PASS. AC2 (eval baseline GREEN before adding tests): PASS (9/9 original tests passed). New tests FAIL against current SKILL.md: PASS (1-2 of 3 testing_mode tests fail per run — testing_mode=GREEN and testing_mode=UPDATE consistently fail because SKILL.md has no testing_mode classification step). Note: promptfoo exits 0 even on test failures, so 'test 0 -ne 0' AC5 is not achievable via exit code — the failures are observable in the [FAIL] table output ✓
